hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"filePath\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.mdx ]]; then head -1 "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^---" || echo "WARNING: MDX file missing frontmatter: $file"; fi'
